title: AutumnPack: Fall Vibes Only
description: Official edit of AutumnPack to remove Halloween additions
body:
## AutumnPack: Fall Vibes Only!
**THIS IS AN OFFICIAL EDIT OF AUTUMNPACK THAT REMOVES ALL HALLOWEEN THINGS!**\
[Check out AutumnPack here!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack)

![Comparison between AutumnPack and AutumnPack: Fall Vibes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pTcn0Wtd/images/ab3a5c2d997ea50a84960889da0f9a230bc08300.png)

<details>
<summary>Autumn Changes</summary>

The world's Colormap is changed to change foliage colors.\
*(also includes VanillaTweaks' 'Golden Savannah' already embedded. vanillatweaks.net)*

Grass looks dryer and has leaves scattered throughout- 3 Different variations

Podzol is retextured to blend better with the newer biome colors

Saplings have been changed to be more consistent with their realistic counterparts

Leaves are now orange, yellow, and red depending on the type of leaves\
*(also allows compatibility with VanillaTweaks' 'Visual Sapling Growth,' vanillatweaks.net)*

Brown Mushrooms have variated amounts when placed

Title screen now has a panorama of an autumn landscape, also added custom splash texts.

<details>
<summary>Sapling Guide</summary>

• Oak Sapling → Acorn

• Spruce Sapling → Pinecone

• Birch Sapling → Birch Catkins

• Dark Oak Sapling → Dark Acorn

• Acacia Sapling → Acacia Seed Pods

• Jungle Sapling → Jungle Pods

• Cherry Sapling → Cherry Pits

</details>


<details>
<summary>Leaf color guide</summary>

Oak - Orange

Birch - Yellow

Spruce - Unchanged (green)

Dark Oak - Red

Acacia - Red

Jungle - Green/beige (depends on biome)

(please keep note that leaves might look 'ugly' in some biomes)

</details>

</details>



</details>

---
